title: Choose WebSockets vs SSE vs Polling in 2024
meta_description: Compare WebSocket vs Server-Sent Events vs long-polling with Node 20 LTS and Redis 7.2 — latency benchmarks, cost data, and the exact mistake that cost $480/month.
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams pick WebSockets for everything and regret it.

Real numbers from 1 k concurrent users:

WebSocket: 18 ms latency, $189/month
SSE: 35 ms latency…

https://kubaik.github.io/choose-websockets-vs-sse-vs-polling-in-2024

#Blockchain #WebDev #Redis #WebSockets

Hot take: most people skip the measurement step. Agree?
